title: WenXin's Warp Pipes
description: A new form of transportation from the Mario universe!
body:
![Warp Pipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9253bbfa3674eaec875bf6fc9439ee05c95341b.png)

![RocketNode Server Hosting - Code: WARP-PIPES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c681a156a0f96cac67d4a19e6161fd09610df84.png)
**Link**: https://rocketnode.com/wenxin
**Code**: **WARP-PIPES 25% Off** ___ # đź“— DESCRIPTION đź“— **This mod adds a new form of transportation from the Mario universe, the Warp Pipe!**
đź”ąPipes come in all **16 colors**, including the Clear Warp Pipe!
đź”ąWarp Pipes will rarely generate **underwater** during world gen.
đź”ą**Teleport** between any linked Warp Pipes.
đź”ą**Quickly travel** inside Clear Warp Pipes.Â

**Extra Features!**
đź”ą**Pipe Bubbles** spew out of underwater pipes and can be toggled!
đź”ą**Pipe Bubbles** push you away from the pipe!
đź”ą**Water Spouts** can spew out of pipes when toggled!
đź”ą**Water Spouts** launch you upwards!
đź”ą**Water Spouts** are an infinite water source!
âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–
**Explore a structure based on the classic World 1-2!**
đź”ą**Enter** the dungeon through the sideways pipeÂ found on the surface next to a castle.
đź”ą**Find** the key in the dungeon to unlock the castle chest!
âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–âž–
**RenameÂ your pipes!**
đź”ą**Right-click** the pipe to format the text:
Â  Â  đź”¸**Dyes** change text colors (Works automatically with Dye Depot)
Â  Â  đź”¸**Glow ink sacs** makes the text glow
Â  Â  đź”¸**Ink sacs** removes the glowing text
Â  Â  đź”¸**Honeycombs** waxes the pipe to prevent renaming and text formatting.
Â  Â  đź”¸**Brushes** applies/removes text on specific sides of the pipe
Â  Â  đź”¸**Supplementaries' bubble wand** removes text on specific sides of the pipe

## đź“ť INSTRUCTIONSÂ đź“ť
đź”¸**Pipe wrenches**Â are used for everything pipe related.
đź”¸**Right-click** pipes with the **Pipe Wrench** to open the GUI
đź”¸**Shift-right-click** to link pipes together.

![Warp Pipe GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4f7703af70fa8e6c180591c5dc4ef7c88935da9.png)
## đź“ť Old 1.19.2 Instructions đź“ťÂ 
đź”¸**Right-click** pipes to link pipes together
đź”¸**Left-click** to choose to **open/close** pipes or **enable/disable** pipe bubbles
đź”¸**Shift-right-click**Â to trigger what was selected above ## đź“ś RECIPES đź“ś
![Recipes](https://github.com/WenXin20/Warp-Pipes/blob/1.21/all_recipes.png?raw=true) ## âš™ď¸Ź CONFIGÂ âš™ď¸Ź
đź› ď¸Ź Require **creative** to turn pipe bubbles on/offÂ **[Default: false]**
đź› ď¸Ź Require **creative** to turn water spouts on/off **[Default: false]**
đź› ď¸Ź Require **creative** to open/close pipesÂ **[Default: false]**
đź› ď¸Ź Require **creative** to link pipes **[Default: false]**
đź› ď¸Ź Allow **players** to teleport **[Default: true]**
đź› ď¸Ź Allow **mobs** to teleport **[Default: true]**
đź› ď¸Ź Allow **non-living entities** to teleport **[Default: true]**
## âš™ď¸Ź ADVANCED CONFIGURATION âš™ď¸Ź
đź› ď¸Ź **Default** block & item tags include `warp_pipes:warp_pipes` andÂ `warp_pipes:dyeable_warp_pipes`.
đź› ď¸Ź **Prevent** mobs from warping using the `warp_pipes:warp_blacklist` entity tag
đź”ąIncludes `#forge:bosses`, `#twilightforest:bosses`, and vanilla bosses by default.
đź› ď¸Ź Prevent mobs from moving quickly through Clear Warp Pipes using the `warp_pipes:quick_travel_blacklist` entity tag.
đź”ąEmpty by default
đź› ď¸Ź If the player has op, pipes can be given the **nbt** tag `PreventWarp: 1b` to prevent warping. **[Default: 0b]**
đź› ď¸Ź If the player has op, entities can be given the **nbt** tag `"warp_pipes:prevent_warp": 1b` to prevent warping. **[Default:Â 0b]**
